package com.example.appserver.cache;

import com.example.appserver.cache.JobStatusCache.JobStatus;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.AfterEach;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;

import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;

class JobStatusCacheTest {

    private static final String JOB_NAME = "testJob";
    private static final String STATUS = "RUNNING";
    private static final String URL = "https://example.com/report.pdf";

    @AfterEach
    void tearDown() {
        JobStatusCache.clearStatus(JOB_NAME);
    }

    @Test
    void updateStatus_shouldStoreJobStatusCorrectly() {
        // when
        JobStatusCache.updateStatus(JOB_NAME, STATUS, URL);

        // then
        JobStatus result = JobStatusCache.getStatus(JOB_NAME);
        assertThat(result).isNotNull();
        assertThat(result.getStatus()).isEqualTo(STATUS);
        assertThat(result.getUrl()).isEqualTo(URL);
    }

    @Test
    void getStatus_shouldReturnNullForNonExistentJob() {
        // when
        JobStatus result = JobStatusCache.getStatus("unknownJob");

        // then
        assertThat(result).isNull();
    }

    @Test
    void clearStatus_shouldRemoveJobFromCache() {
        // given
        JobStatusCache.updateStatus(JOB_NAME, STATUS, URL);
        assertThat(JobStatusCache.getStatus(JOB_NAME)).isNotNull();

        // when
        JobStatusCache.clearStatus(JOB_NAME);

        // then
        JobStatus result = JobStatusCache.getStatus(JOB_NAME);
        assertThat(result).isNull();
    }

    @Test
    void updateStatus_shouldOverwriteExistingStatus() {
        // given
        JobStatusCache.updateStatus(JOB_NAME, "RUNNING", URL);

        // when
        JobStatusCache.updateStatus(JOB_NAME, "COMPLETED", "https://example.com/completed.pdf");

        // then
        JobStatus result = JobStatusCache.getStatus(JOB_NAME);
        assertThat(result).isNotNull();
        assertThat(result.getStatus()).isEqualTo("COMPLETED");
        assertThat(result.getUrl()).isEqualTo("https://example.com/completed.pdf");
    }
}
